title: Erysimum nudiusculum
taxonomy: Erysimum nudiusculum is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is commonly known as a wild candytuft or rock candytuft. This species belongs to the genus Erysimum, which includes various species of flowering plants. The genus Erysimum is further classified under the order Brassicales, a group of flowering plants that also includes cabbages and mustard. The classification of Erysimum nudiusculum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Brassicaceae family.
uses: Erysimum nudiusculum, a lesser-known species, has been found to have potential medicinal properties. It is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
